name: Al-Babtain Power & Telecommunication
message: Stock Symbol 2320. www.al-babtain.com.sa http://www.albabtain-egypt.com/ Al-Babtain Power & Telecom was established as a family run business in 1955. Over the decades, Al-Babtain has expanded into different countries and diversified into different industries. Here is a map of our journey to become one of the top 100 companies in Saudi Arabia. Al Babtain Power & Telecommunication (ABP&T) was founded in 1955. It is one of the largest manufacturers and suppliers in the field of outdoor lighting, Transmission & Distribution & Telecommunication Footprints.
